Sewing and crafts: Grosgrain ribbon is by far the most popular ribbon for hair accessories and craft projects. Its specialty weave includes thick, lengthwise fibers with textured parallel ridges that are ideal for enhancing the durability of any material.

description: White Grosgrian Ribbon Works great for a variety of clothing pieces—from belts to ties. Use our ribbons as hat bands, edge protectors, or embellished bracelets. Its specialty weave includes thick, lengthwise fibers with textured parallel ridges that are ideal for enhancing the durability of any material.
